product: Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — workers REST resource
interface: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM, resource version 11.13.18.05, REST framework version 4

service.base_path: /hcmRestApi/resources/11.13.18.05 — the fixed resource version segment; the workers collection hangs off it at /workers
service.authentication: basic auth in this fixture: Authorization: Basic base64(user:password) on EVERY request

required_headers.REST-Framework-Version: 4 — framework version 4 or later selects the structured error document; sent on every request

query_serialization.order: onlyData, fields, expand, finder, effectiveDate, orderBy, totalResults, limit, offset — options that were not set are omitted entirely (booleans left false are omitted, not serialized as false)
query_serialization.fields: fields=Attr1,Attr2 — comma-separated attribute names, commas literal
query_serialization.expand: expand=childAccessor[,more] — commas literal; fields and expand are documented as not combinable, so the builder must reject setting both (IllegalStateException)
query_serialization.finder: finder=<name>;<var1>=<value1>,<var2>=<value2> — literal ';' after the finder name, literal ',' between variables, variable VALUES percent-encoded (space -> %20)
query_serialization.effectiveDate: effectiveDate=yyyy-MM-dd — fetches rows effective as of that date; default is the current date
query_serialization.totalResults: totalResults=true adds an ESTIMATED totalResults row count to the response; it is never a paging bound

collection_envelope.shape: { items: [...], count: n, hasMore: bool, limit: n, offset: n, totalResults?: n }
collection_envelope.count: number of rows in THIS response
collection_envelope.hasMore: true while the server holds more rows; the only valid loop condition
collection_envelope.limit: the ACTUAL paging size the server used — this tenant clamps any requested limit to 4, so a client that advances offset by its requested limit (100) skips rows
collection_envelope.offset_rule: next offset = previous offset + returned count; the walk ends when hasMore is false
collection_envelope.onlyData: onlyData=true removes all links sections from the payload
collection_envelope.expanded_children: an expanded child accessor arrives as a nested collection envelope: "workRelationships": { items: [...], count, hasMore, limit, offset } — clients unwrap items

error_document.rule: every o:errorDetails entry is preserved in order and navigable from the raised exception; the exception message carries title and the first o:errorCode; credentials never appear in exception text

mock_fixture.origin: loopback http://127.0.0.1:{port} standing in for the Fusion pod
mock_fixture.as_of_2026-07-01: 9 workers — E-0105's row is no longer effective; E-0103's date-effective name row reads 'Pat Chen-Okafor'
mock_fixture.error_trigger: effectiveDate=1900-01-01 answers 400 with the pinned error document
